untranslatable_reason: Pattern identification (BB/Bulkowski pattern) and pattern height calculation require custom pattern detection logic not available in standard indicators. The signal requires: (1) identification of specific chart pattern type, (2) calculation of pattern height as (High - Low) / Breakout Price, (3) comparison to median threshold across historical patterns. These require pattern recognition algorithms beyond the scope of basic technical indicators.
translation_notes: Attempted placeholder conditions using directional body signals and hold_days_max of 70 days based on source text mentioning patterns taking 'over 70 days' to reach ultimate high in bull markets. Exit conditions use 5% reversal threshold as placeholder for unspecified trend change monitoring. Author silent on most parameters. Core pattern classification logic cannot be translated without custom pattern detection module.
